title: Dropdown Menu / Feature
excerpt: Hi, can you please add a scroll bar to the right of the “Dropdown” column on a board? Currently, the only way to scroll down is to use the wheel on a mouse. There is a huge demographic of workers who use a tablet + stylu…

posts.author: Gabe-NTS (Gabriel Gonzalez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, can you please add a scroll bar to the right of the “Dropdown” column on a board? Currently, the only way to scroll down is to use the wheel on a mouse. There is a huge demographic of workers who use a tablet + stylus pen to work. Without a “roll wheel” it’s a huge pain to scroll down a longer menu that sometimes gets cut off. If you had a little scroll bar like most standard windows have, it would be super easy just to click and drag up or down. I hope this reaches anyone who can help. Seems like an easy fix.
